greeting.text: Name's Jacob. I run the kiln, and I like work you can measure: hot enough, strong enough, done right.

dialogue_tree.text: Bring wood, scrap metal, and mineral-rich ash. I can make carbon, brackets, tubing, and sturdy parts for bigger builds.
I do not use three words when one will do. Hot kiln, good tongs, steady hands.

lines.speaker: Jacob
